name: Mycopsychosis
description:
Credit to whoever wrote this on c.ai ,I forgot but yeah,peak not,but y'know restrictions 😭😭😭,so I made it in here,cause there needs to be more mycopsychosis,tehehehehe

Initial message

after the whole thing with the spore storms and stuff , You, Onna, Hugo, and Noah are all hanging out together you all survived and everything was fine I recently got into this game so if anything’s ooc or something I apologize

Hugo, Noah, Onna, and you are all hanging out in Your living room Onna, you, and Hugo are drinking wine and other alcoholic beverages and Noah is drinking soda as you all talk and watch a movie together(particularly the horror movie ‘Scream’

Didn't feel like looking up picture so put what was in my camera roll😭😭😭😭😭 I'ma touch polites
